hero.heading: Finance Your Project
hero.description: Multiple financing options to fit your budget
hero.note: ^Rates and terms may vary by lending partner.

options.name: Enhancify
options.subtitle: Marketplace Financing
options.description: Compare multiple lender offers in one place. See your personalized rates in 60 seconds with no impact on your credit score.

options.name: Acorn Finance
options.subtitle: Home Improvement Loans
options.description: Get pre-qualified for home improvement financing without affecting your credit score. Compare rates from multiple lenders and choose the best option.

options.name: GreenSky
options.subtitle: Home Improvement Financing
options.description: Flexible financing plans with promotional APR options. Subject to credit approval. Available exclusively for Assured Restoration clients.
options.notice_text: Available by invitation from our team. Contact us to receive your personalized application link.

how_it_works.title: Submit a quick application on our partner site.
Review offers and select the one that fits your needs.
Finalize with your lender and get funded in 1-5 business days.

why_choose: Turn a large purchase into an affordable monthly payment
Predictable monthly payments with a set end-date
Get your project done without weeks of meetings with banks, home appraisals, or paperwork
